articles.title: MLRIT Placements 2026: Cognizant, Infosys, HCL Tech Lead Campus Recruitment
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology's 2026 campus placement drive is well underway with top MNCs on board. Cognizant has selected 107 students, Infosys 92, HCL Tech 85, Virtusa 41, Deloitte 20, SLK 25, ITC Infotech 25, and TCS 14 — continuing MLRIT's strong placement legacy of 80%+ placement rates every year.

articles.title: MLRIT Ranked 201–300 in NIRF 2025 Engineering Category
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology has been ranked in the 201–300 band under the Engineering category by the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) 2025, Ministry of Education, Government of India. This recognition reflects MLRIT's consistent academic excellence, research output, and graduate outcomes over two decades.

articles.title: MLRIT 2025 Placements: Highest Package ₹33 LPA, 536 Offers from 62 Companies
articles.summary: The 2025 placement season at MLR Institute of Technology concluded with 536 job offers from 62 companies. The highest package stood at ₹33 LPA (ServiceNow — Associate Software QA Engineer). Other top offers came from BigWorks (₹26 LPA), Catalog (₹25 LPA), Inovation (₹25 LPA), and Juspay (₹21 LPA). Cognizant, Infosys, GlobalLogic, HCL Tech, and Tata Advanced Systems were among the major recruiters.

articles.title: MLRIT Achieves NBA Tier-1 Re-Accreditation for All Eligible Engineering Programmes
articles.summary: Marri Laxman Reddy Institute of Technology (MLRIT) achieved the National Board of Accreditation (NBA) Tier-1 status — the highest accreditation level — for all eligible engineering programmes. The re-accreditation covers the period 2022–2025, affirming the institute's commitment to outcome-based education and quality standards.

articles.title: MLRIT 2024 Placements: Highest Package ₹44 LPA, 674 Job Offers
articles.summary: The 2024 batch at MLR Institute of Technology recorded a highest package of ₹44 LPA and a median package of ₹6 LPA. A total of 674 job offers were made, with top recruiters including Amazon, TCS, Deloitte, Infosys, DXC, Accenture, EPAM, and Brillio. The CSE department led placements with 80–90% of students placed.

articles.title: MLRIT Ranked 9th in Telangana and 39th in South Zone by The Week 2025
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology has been ranked 9th in Telangana, 9th in Hyderabad, and 39th in South Zone among top private engineering colleges by The Week magazine's 2025 survey. The institute also featured as 6th among Emerging Private Engineering Colleges in India, reflecting its rapid growth and academic quality.

articles.title: MLRIT Celebrates 20 Years of Excellence in Technical Education
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology marked its 20th anniversary in 2025, having grown from a single campus in Dundigal to one of Hyderabad's most recognised engineering institutions. Over 7,000 alumni have been placed across 400+ companies globally since 2005. The institute offers 11 UG and 5 PG programmes with a total annual intake exceeding 1,000 students.

articles.title: MLRIT Ranked 109 by IIRF 2024 in Engineering Category
articles.summary: The Indian Institutional Ranking Framework (IIRF) 2024 ranked MLR Institute of Technology at position 109 in the Engineering category nationally. This adds to MLRIT's growing list of national recognitions alongside NIRF, The Week, and Outlook rankings, cementing its position among India's top private engineering colleges.

articles.title: MLRIT Expands CSE Intake to 420 Seats — Largest Department in Telangana Private Colleges
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology has expanded its Computer Science and Engineering intake to 420 seats per year, making it one of the largest CSE departments among private engineering colleges in Telangana. Specialisations in AI & ML (180 seats), Data Science (180 seats), and Cyber Security are also available, reflecting strong industry demand for tech graduates.

articles.title: MLRIT Partners with 400+ Companies for Campus Placements — 7000+ Alumni Placed
articles.summary: Over its 20-year journey, MLR Institute of Technology has built partnerships with more than 400 companies for campus recruitment, resulting in over 7,000 alumni placements. The Training & Placement cell has consistently achieved 80% and above placement rates every year, with MNCs like Cognizant, Infosys, TCS, Amazon, Deloitte, and GlobalLogic as regular recruiters.

articles.title: MLRIT Offers Highest Package of ₹58 Lakhs — Recognised for Industry Connections
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology has been recognised for its strong industry connections, with the highest package offered to its graduates reaching approximately ₹58 lakhs per annum. The institute's modern 25-acre campus, state-of-the-art labs, and active industry collaboration programmes have contributed to its strong placement outcomes year after year.

articles.title: MLRIT Autonomous Status Renewed — UGC Recognises Academic Excellence
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology continues to hold Autonomous status granted by the University Grants Commission (UGC) since 2015, affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). The autonomous status allows MLRIT to design its own curriculum, conduct examinations, and award degrees — enabling faster adoption of industry-relevant courses.

articles.title: MLRIT Sports Fest 2024 — Students Excel in Inter-University Competitions
articles.summary: MLRIT's annual Sports Fest brought together students from across departments for competitions in cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, and athletics. MLRIT students have consistently represented the institution at JNTUH inter-university level, winning medals in multiple disciplines. The institute's integrated curriculum places equal emphasis on sports alongside academics.

articles.title: MLRIT CSE Students Secure Top Roles at ServiceNow, Juspay and Amadeus Labs
articles.summary: CSE graduates from MLR Institute of Technology's 2025 batch secured prestigious roles at global technology companies. Highlights include an Associate Software QA Engineer role at ServiceNow (₹33 LPA), a Product Engineer position at Juspay (₹21 LPA), and Software Engineer roles at Amadeus Labs (₹12.6 LPA). These placements reflect the strong technical foundation built at MLRIT.

articles.title: MLRIT Aeronautical Engineering Students Placed at Tata Advanced Systems and SAFRAN
articles.summary: Aeronautical Engineering graduates from MLRIT's 2025 batch secured placements at prestigious aerospace companies including Tata Advanced Systems Limited (84 students as Graduate Engineer Trainees) and SAFRAN (Graduate Engineer Trainees at ₹4 LPA). AKSI Aerospace also recruited 6 students as UAV Engineer Interns, highlighting MLRIT's strong aerospace industry connections.

articles.title: MLRIT Introduces New Specialisations in CSE — Cyber Security and Data Science Gain Popularity
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology's specialised CSE programmes in Cyber Security and Data Science have seen growing enrolment, with 180 seats each in AI & ML and Data Science streams. These programmes cover ethical hacking, cryptography, big data analytics, Python, and machine learning — aligned with the highest-demand skills in the current job market.

articles.title: MLRIT Consistently Achieves 80%+ Placement Rate for 20 Consecutive Years
articles.summary: In a remarkable achievement, MLR Institute of Technology has maintained a placement rate of 80% and above for 20 consecutive years since its founding in 2005. The Training & Placement cell has built relationships with over 400 companies, ensuring students across all departments — from CSE to Aeronautical Engineering — have strong career opportunities upon graduation.

articles.title: MLRIT Outlook Ranking 2024 — Recognised Among Top Engineering Colleges
articles.summary: MLR Institute of Technology was ranked 132 by Outlook magazine in the Engineering category in 2024, adding to its growing portfolio of national rankings. The institute has been consistently featured in Outlook, The Week, NIRF, and IIRF rankings, reflecting its all-round performance in academics, placements, research, and infrastructure.

articles.title: MLRIT Mechanical and EEE Students Placed at Amara Raja, Schneider Electric and HBL
articles.summary: Students from MLRIT's Mechanical Engineering and EEE departments secured placements at leading core engineering companies in 2025. Amara Raja Group recruited 6 students as Graduate Engineer Trainees, Schneider Electric hired 5 as Graduate Engineer Trainees (₹5.5 LPA), and HBL recruited 2 students. These placements highlight MLRIT's strength beyond IT — in core engineering sectors.

articles.title: MLRIT Celebrates Student Achievements in SAE India Southern Section 2024–25
articles.summary: MLRIT students participated and excelled in the SAE India Southern Section competitions for 2024–25, showcasing their engineering design and innovation skills. The institute's active participation in SAE events reflects its commitment to hands-on, project-based learning and industry-standard engineering practices.
